texto: When I was in high school, there was 'Superbad' and 'The Girl Next Door' and 'Wedding Crashers' and all these great movies. You hope to be a part of something that's smart, funny and in that Todd Phillips-vein. You want to make something like 'Superbad.' That movie was so good and so funny.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Miles Teller: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a educacao. O trecho “When I was in high school, there was 'Superbad' and 'The Girl Next Door' and 'Wedding Crashers' a…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que educacao, funny, esperanca pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de casamento e esperanca.

frase_original: When I was in high school, there was 'Superbad' and 'The Girl Next Door' and 'Wedding Crashers' and all these great movies. You hope to be a part of something that's smart, funny and in that Todd Phillips-vein. You want to make something like 'Superbad.' That movie was so good and so funny.
